subcodes.first_line: O thou companion of the heart and soul of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thy letter brought joy upon joy, bearing glad tidings of happiness and success [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار دل و جان عبدالبهاء نامه فرح اندر فرح بود و مژده شادمانی و کامرانی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @importance of community building
